item.title: MAD345 Mining II(T), Week 03
item.description: Dear all, Lecture notes are available here. Good luck, ☀️ GERTUNC ⚒

item.title: MAD345 Mining II(T), Week 02
item.description: ## Warning: package 'kableExtra' was built under R version 4.0.3 Date Topic October 7 Introduction October 8 Rocks, minerals and mineral inventory evaluation October 14 Mining Method Selection (Lecture slides link) Dear all, These are the videos for U/G productions. Room-and-pillar mining: Longwall mining: Block caving:
